# ZERO

> ZERO is an autonomous operating system for self-custodial onchain operations.
> The public repo is paper-first, local-first, Apache-2.0, and structured for
> human and agent contributors.

## Docs For Agents

- [ZERO docs index](docs/llms.txt)
- [Full LLM context](docs/llms-full.txt)
- [Agent operating guide](AGENTS.md)
- [Contributor issue board](docs/contributor-issue-board.md)
- [OpenAPI v1](openapi/zero-paper-api.v1.yaml)
